stemHtml: The blades in an axial flow compressor decrease in size from the…

options.a: root to the tip in order to increase tip clearance.
options.b: high pressure to the low pressure stages in order to allow for expansion at increased velocity.
options.c: root to the tip in order to maintain a constant angle of attack.
options.d: low pressure to the high pressure stages in an attempt to sustain axial velocity.
